subcodes.first_line: The glory be upon thee, O thou leaf that stirreth in the breeze of the Most Glorious gardens, gladdened by the fragrances of the groves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء علیک ایتها الورقه المهتزه من نسیم ریاض الابهی المستبشره من نفحات غیاض
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
